fields.name: Confirmation
fields.fieldText:
{!Thanks}


Your new offer "{!TitlePlus.value}" has been posted.

fields.name: ReceipentTypeDetails
fields.fieldText: Relationship to the person you are posting for.

validationRule.errorMessage: Please use a format of: X:XX xm

fields.name: Per_Response_Limit
fields.helpText: When you have a quantity of more than 1, you can limit how much each user can receive, to help spread the wealth across the neighbourhood.

validationRule.errorMessage: The 'Per Response Limit' must be less or equal to the 'Quantity Available'.

fields.name: End_Date_Post_Expiration_Date
fields.helpText: Posts expire after a maximum of 3 weeks.

validationRule.errorMessage: Please select an expiry date no more that 3 months from today's date.
Please use a format of: X:XX xm

fields.name: PostSettings
fields.fieldText:
Post Settings

If you are comfortable, auto-accepting and auto-sharing your contact info with those who respond can make things quicker & easier for you.
